spec.name: The Clerics' Inner Sanctum
spec.description: This is the inner sanctum. A picture of the mighty Thor, is hanging on the wall, just above the altar which is set against the western wall. A well in the middle of the floor leads down into darkness. Vile smells waft from the depths.

east.description: You see your favorite place, the bar of divination.

down.description: You can't see what is down there, it is too dark. Looks like it would be impossible to climb back up.
